ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MAUNG, MILES HM HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-2021 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 103N
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER -- (SETTING NEW HEARING DATE OF NOV-17-2021; 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 -- RE PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-03-2021 IN DEPT. 206 -- APPEARANCE BY PETITIONER MILES MAUNG -- PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS IS CONTINUED FROM NOV-03-2021 TO NOV-17-2021, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE COURT'S EARLIER RULING DURING THE 11/3/21 HEARING GRANTING APPLICANT'S FEE WAIVER IS SET ASIDE DUE TO INSUFFICIENT INFORMATION ON THE APPLICATION. THE COURT SETS A NEW HEARING DATE FOR 11/17/21 TO HEAR PETITIONER MILES MAUNG'S REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS. ORDER SETTING NEW HEARING DATE IS SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DECREE CHANGING NAME GRANTED FILED BY PETITIONER MAUNG, MILES HM

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER MAUNG, MILES HM ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR NOV-03-2021 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER MAUNG, MILES HM

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2021 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER MILES MAUNG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PETITIONER MAUNG, MILES HM
